(DEVICE FILE: CON2_KF128-254-2P_KF128-254-2P - used for device: 'CON2_KF128-254-2P_KF128-2.54-2P')

PACKAGE 'KF128-254-2P'
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 2

FUNCTION G1 'CON2_KF128-254-2P_KF128-2.54-2P' 1 2

END
